title: Day countr
description: A day counter mod, Puts the day on the left bottom corner.
body:
# About this mod
This is a day counter mod that counts the days and displays it on screen. This mod works with all resolutions and only works with the fabric mod loader. It's even open source so if you ever want to make your own features, and you know Java, and the fabric mod loader well enough go ahead and fork this project!
